creator: vanilla@FreeBSD.org
text:
I got following errors.

===>   watchman-3.0.0 depends on shared library: libpcre.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libpcre.so.1.2.3)
===>  Configuring for watchman-3.0.0
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/watchman/work/watchman-3.0.0 && /bin/sh ./autogen.sh
